title: acilepis setigera
intro: Acilepis setigera, also known as the 'hairy daisy', is a type of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Acilepis setigera include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as poultices and ointments.
